headlines.title: Tech titans mostly silent after Pope Leo’s warning about risks of AI
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV’s sweeping warning about the dangers of artificial intelligence drew a largely muted response across the American technology world.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Gandalf, Picasso and MLK: Cultural references ground Pope Leo’s AI warning
headlines.description: It took a little over a year for Pope Leo XIV to write more than 42,000 words of his first encyclical, which deals with safeguarding human dignity in the age of artificial intelligence.

headlines.title: Pope Leo warns AI is fueling conflict, urges world to slow advances
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV has called for AI advances to be slowed and blamed the technology for fueling conflict around the world.

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

headlines.title: Trump abruptly scraps signing of landmark executive order regulating AI
headlines.description: President Donald Trump scrapped an executive order signing Thursday. The order is expected to lay out partnerships with leading AI companies to vet new models.

headlines.title: Ken Paxton wins Republican Senate primary in Texas
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Trump-backed candidate Ken Paxton has defeated Sen. John Cornyn in the Republican Senate primary runoff in Texas. NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down the vote numbers and Ryan Chandler reports from Cornyn’s election headquarters.

headlines.title: NASA’s Jared Isaacman shares moon base plans
headlines.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman talks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about plans for building a base on the moon, rover designs, and what’s next for the Artemis missions.

headlines.title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence
headlines.description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.

headlines.title: Robotic exoskeletons promise easier hikes and high-tech workouts
headlines.description: Wearable exoskeletons promise to boost endurance on hikes and workouts. NBC News' Ryan Chandler explores whether the high-tech gear is the future of fitness - or just a fad.

headlines.title: How 'Age Tech' might help you grow old at home and with more ease
headlines.description: It can be hard for older adults to live independently if they don’t have a caregiver or anyone close by to help them out. Now, there’s technology that can help older adults broaden their options, make their homes safer and ease caregivers’ minds.

headlines.title: Shop These Discounts on Everything You Need for Fun in the Sun
headlines.description: From fashion staples to beauty launches, Shop TODAY lifestyle and fashion contributor Chassie Post stops by Studio 1A to share a hotlist of the best discounted products to kick off your Memorial Day weekend. Products include Old Navy foldover pants, a Lands’ End polo dress, the Nori press iron, and more!
